title: The Last Cars Are Cut Away
description: The Straw Hats’ allies and the enemies aboard the Sea Train trade blows as the rescue closes in on Robin.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Chopper. The Straw Hats’ allies and the enemies aboard the Sea Train trade blows as the rescue closes in on Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We're not through the storm yet!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: How is it over there!? How's Nico Robin!?

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: Nico Robin is... still in their hands.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Nami told me everything just now.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You wouldn't listen to us either.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: But unfortunately, after hearing about Nico Robin's reasons...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: even if captain ordered me to...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Granny, make this train go faster!!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: So then, Nico Robin's on this train, too...

dialogue.speaker: Kokoro
dialogue.text: So many things happened after I left...!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Nico Robin probably doesn't know a thing...

summary: The Straw Hats’ allies and the enemies aboard the Sea Train trade blows as the rescue closes in on Robin.
